en_title: CD Projekt's New IP, Project Hadar, Gets Extremely Vague Tease via Job Ad
cn_title: CD Projekt新IP《哈达尔》招聘信息透露模糊线索
subtitle: 第三支柱？
opus_summary: CD Projekt目前正全力开发《巫师4》和《赛博朋克2》，但同时也在筹备一个全新IP，代号《哈达尔》。虽然该作仍处于早期预开发阶段，仅24人参与，但一则招聘广告暗示这将是一款沉浸式开放世界游戏，旨在打造情感驱动的体验。CD Projekt希望《哈达尔》能成为继《巫师》和《赛博朋克》之后的第三大支柱系列，不过距离发售仍需数年。公司还公布了雄心勃勃的计划：在六年内连续推出《巫师4》《巫师5》《巫师6》，这基本排除了《巫师4》推出扩展包的可能性。

paragraphs.en: CD Projekt is focused on The Witcher 4 and Cyberpunk 2 right now, but it’s also got a brand new IP in the works, codenamed Project Hadar . And while Hadar is shrouded in mystery, a new job advert has teased what to expect, although given it's a CD Projekt game, perhaps none of this should come as a surprise.
paragraphs.cn: CD Projekt目前正全力开发《巫师4》和《赛博朋克2》，但同时也在筹备一个全新IP，代号《哈达尔》。虽然《哈达尔》仍笼罩在神秘之中，但一则新的招聘广告透露了一些线索——不过考虑到这是CD Projekt的游戏，这些线索或许并不令人意外。

paragraphs.en: As spotted by GamesRadar , a job ad for Project Hadar calls for an engineering director who will help “push the envelope for the next, immersive game in the Hadar world, creating an emotional, open-world experience that will stay with gamers.”
paragraphs.cn: 据GamesRadar发现，《哈达尔》项目的一则招聘广告正在招募工程总监，其职责是「推动《哈达尔》世界下一款沉浸式游戏的发展，打造一款情感丰富、令玩家难忘的开放世界体验」。

paragraphs.en: Based on that brief description, it sounds like CD Projekt hopes Hadar will become its third tentpole video game franchise, up there with The Witcher and Cyberpunk, and will play along the same lines. Given how successful both series have been, that’s a lofty ambition. But you wouldn’t bet against it, this being CD Projekt’s first own, original IP after developing games for existing properties for close to 20 years.
paragraphs.cn: 从这段简短的描述来看，CD Projekt似乎希望《哈达尔》能成为其第三大支柱游戏系列，与《巫师》和《赛博朋克》并驾齐驱，并遵循类似的路线。鉴于这两个系列都取得了巨大成功，这无疑是一个雄心勃勃的目标。但考虑到这是CD Projekt在近20年基于现有IP开发游戏后，推出的首个完全原创IP，你很难不看好它。

paragraphs.en: Hadar, though, is likely still years away, despite official early conceptual work beginning in late 2021. The foundation of the new setting was still in a creative exploration stage a few years ago, and is only now described as being in the "early pre-development" stage. Is Hadar a fantasy title? A sci-fi game? A game in a modern setting? Is it purely single-player or will it have multiplayer? We don’t know.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，《哈达尔》可能仍需数年才能问世，尽管官方早在2021年底就开始了早期概念工作。几年前，新世界观的构建仍处于创意探索阶段，而如今才被描述为「早期预开发」阶段。《哈达尔》是奇幻题材？科幻游戏？还是现代背景？它是纯单人游戏还是包含多人模式？我们不得而知。

paragraphs.en: We do know Hadar is still a relatively small project within CD Projekt itself, with just 24 people working on it, according to the company’s latest financial report. To put that into context, 513 people are working on The Witcher 4 , 163 on Cyberpunk 2 , and 83 on Sirius , the multiplayer-focused video game set in The Witcher universe. And we now know The Witcher 3 is getting a brand new expansion , although the heavy lifting is being done by Fool’s Theory.
paragraphs.cn: 不过我们确实知道，《哈达尔》在CD Projekt内部仍是一个相对较小的项目，根据公司最新财报，仅有24人参与。作为对比，有513人正在开发《巫师4》，163人开发《赛博朋克2》，83人开发《天狼星》（一款以《巫师》宇宙为背景的多人游戏）。此外，我们现在知道《巫师3》将迎来一个全新的扩展包，尽管主要开发工作由Fool's Theory负责。

paragraphs.en: On top of that, CD Projekt has an extremely ambitious plan to launch The Witcher 4, The Witcher 5, and The Witcher 6 all in a six-year time period . It's this plan which essentially rules out the possibility of expansions for The Witcher 4. And then there’s Cyberpunk 2 to consider. How Hadar slots in CD Projekt's packed release plans remains to be seen.
paragraphs.cn: 除此之外，CD Projekt还有一个极其雄心勃勃的计划：在六年内连续推出《巫师4》《巫师5》和《巫师6》。正是这一计划基本排除了《巫师4》推出扩展包的可能性。此外还有《赛博朋克2》需要考虑。《哈达尔》将如何融入CD Projekt密集的发售计划，仍有待观察。

paragraphs.en: Photographer: Patrick T. Fallon/Bloomberg via Getty Images.
paragraphs.cn: 摄影师：Patrick T. Fallon/彭博社via Getty Images。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.

pending_dict.reason: 不知名工作室，保留英文
